overrideJustification: ORCHESTRATOR OVERRIDE: VAL-CROSS-004 remains deferred to future milestones. Round 2 rechecked the real CLI surface and confirmed src/backtest/run.py (ml-pipeline) and src/pipeline/daily.py (decision-engine) still do not exist, so the assertion stays pending for those later milestones while the other 10 feature-engineering assertions remain passed.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Round 2 rechecked the real CLI surface and confirmed `src/pipeline/daily.py` and `src/backtest/run.py` are still absent; both documented commands fail with module-not-found errors, so parity validation remains deferred to later ml-pipeline and decision-engine milestones.

appliedUpdates.description: Corrected the Windows virtualenv path to `.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe` and added feature-engineering targeted test-file guidance.
Documented the missing `src/pipeline/daily.py` and `src/backtest/run.py` entrypoints as the current blocker for `VAL-CROSS-004` CLI parity validation.
Documented the Windows setup friction where direct `bash .factory/init.sh` can fail to find `pip`, and that validators should prefer the manifest's Windows init flow instead.
